Start free. Scale as you grow. No hidden fees on GPU usage.

Pro

$79/month

For serious ML practitioners and small teams.

Start Pro Trial
  • ✓25 active models
  • ✓Layer Editor (all layers)
  • ✓A100 GPU access

  • ✓Priority support

Enterprise

$349/month

For organizations with production ML workloads.

Contact Sales
  • ✓Unlimited models
  • ✓Layer Editor + custom layers
  • ✓H100 GPU access
  • ✓500 GPU hours/month
  • ✓Dedicated support + SLA

  • ✓Custom deployment + edge export

FeatureStarterProEnterprise
Active Models325Unlimited
GPU TypesT4T4, A100T4, A100, H100
GPU Hours/Month10100500
Layer TypesBasic (15)All (50+)All + Custom

Model Registry—BasicFull + Audit
Team Seats13Unlimited
Deployment—REST APIAPI + Edge + Batch
